product_overview: Japeak is an AI-powered Japanese learning app for JLPT and beginner learners that generates adaptive quizzes using a hybrid of database caching and real-time LLM inference. The backend provides JWT-based authentication and quiz APIs that adjust difficulty based on user performance and history.
core_goals: Provide secure user registration and login with JWT authentication
Generate personalized Japanese quizzes based on user level, difficulty, and past performance
Record quiz attempts to support adaptive learning and review
Use AI models efficiently by preferring cached content and falling back between Gemini and Groq when needed
Deliver a scalable backend foundation for a React Native Japanese learning experience

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Allows users to register and log in to the Japeak platform so they can receive JWT tokens and access protected learning features.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/register with valid email, password, and nickname -> Receive 200 with JWT token and user profile -> Use token for authenticated requests to protected APIs
POST /api/auth/register with an email that already exists -> Receive an error response indicating the account cannot be created
POST /api/auth/login with valid email and password -> Receive 200 with JWT token and user profile -> Store token for future authenticated requests
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive an error response and no JWT token

features.name: Quiz Management API
features.description: Serves adaptive Japanese quiz questions and records quiz outcomes so the system can personalize future quiz difficulty and review patterns.
user_flows: GET /api/quiz/next with valid JWT and query parameters difficulty, wasCorrect, and consecutiveCorrect -> Receive 200 with QuizDto -> Present quiz to the learner -> POST /api/quiz/answer with quizId and isCorrect -> Receive 200 with success true
GET /api/quiz/next with valid JWT after repeated correct answers and higher consecutiveCorrect -> Receive 200 with a more challenging QuizDto selected using history-based logic
GET /api/quiz/next without a JWT token -> Receive an authentication error response
POST /api/quiz/answer with valid JWT but missing or invalid quizId or isCorrect body fields -> Receive an error response and the attempt is not logged
GET /api/quiz/next with valid JWT when AI generation is needed and Gemini fails or rate limits -> Backend falls back to Groq -> Receive 200 with QuizDto generated by the fallback model

endpoints.description: Gets the next quiz based on difficulty and history
